DataRequest.Name: Windows: SCM Database Privileged Operation / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects non-system users performing privileged operation os the SCM database. This rule is adapted from https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/master/rules/windows/builtin/security/win_security_scm_database_privileged_operation.yml
DataRequest.DataSource: Microsoft Windows Security Log via OMI or FortiSIEM Agent

SubPattern.name: Filter
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: (eventType="Win-Security-4674" AND osObjType="SC_MANAGER OBJECT" AND osObjName="servicesactive" AND privName="SeTakeOwnershipPrivilege") AND (winLogonId!="0x3e4" OR procName NOT REGEXP ":\\Windows\\System32\\services\.exe$")

IncidentDef.ArgList: hostName = Filter.hostName,osObjName = Filter.osObjName,osObjType = Filter.osObjType,privName = Filter.privName,procName = Filter.procName,winLogonId = Filter.winLogonId,user = Filter.user
